channel.title: Rates and Plans on Utility Explained
channel.description: Recent content in Rates and Plans on Utility Explained

item.title: Budget Billing and Level Pay Explained
item.description: Your July electric bill hits $320. By October, it’s down to $85. That $235 swing makes budgeting nearly impossible. Budget billing—also called level pay, average billing, or equal payment plans—eliminates this roller coaster by spreading your annual utility costs into 12 equal monthly payments. Most major US utilities offer some form of this program, and enrollment is usually free. But it’s not without trade-offs. Here’s everything you need to know before signing up.
